project: Ink CLI Terminal Rendering Parity — Web-Derived Completion
description: Bring all slash-command flows, room/session label resolution, and picker overlays into Web-derived terminal behavior, including showing Web room names rather than only room IDs.

userStories.title: Document and test the complete slash-command behavior matrix
userStories.description: As an operator, I want every slash command to have predictable terminal behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a command matrix covering all CLI_ONLY_SLASH_COMMANDS, WEB_PARITY_SLASH_COMMANDS, aliases, and dynamic gateway capabilities
For each command, document palette display, argument behavior, transcript/overlay/navigation/exit outcome, context requirements, error behavior, and terminal adaptation
Tests assert command catalog grouping and support labels match the matrix

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Resolve room names from canonical room data across TUI surfaces
userStories.description: As an SSH operator, I want to see Web room names instead of only room IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Room picker, header, session picker, messages, repair results, session-link descriptors, `/sessions`, and `/session-current` prefer room title over room ID when available
LocalCliSessionSource resolves room titles through ChatRoomService/session navigation/session metadata in a deterministic order
Tests cover default Personal Chat, renamed room, archived room, missing room fallback, and stale room ID recovery

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Resolve session labels and room context in command results
userStories.description: As a user, I want command-result rows to explain which named room/session they affect.
acceptanceCriteria: `/clone`, `/fork-candidates`, `/session-current`, `/sessions`, `/new`, and session-link rows include session title and room title when available
IDs remain available as secondary metadata and fallback when labels are missing
Command result normalization accepts optional room/session label fields and redacts them safely
Tests assert no command result shows a raw room ID as the primary label when a room title exists

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification

userStories.title: Align picker overlays with Web navigation semantics
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I want owner/room/session/model/login/thinking/fork picker flows to be compact and predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Owner → room → session flow keeps active/default markers and supports back/cancel behavior
Room/session pickers show named rooms and sessions, not only IDs
Model/login/thinking/fork candidate pickers remain overlays and do not append noisy transcript rows until an action is confirmed
Controller tests cover Enter, Esc, arrow navigation, nested picker back, empty states, and errors

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass

userStories.title: Validate slash and room/session flows through PTY/default path
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want evidence that command and room-label fixes work in the actual TUI.
acceptanceCriteria: PTY scenario exercises `/room`, `/session`, `/sessions`, `/session-current`, `/status`, and at least one runtime command using the installed/local `pibo tui:sessions` path
Screen artifacts show named rooms where fixture/canonical data provides names
Assertions reject raw room ID as primary label when a room title is available
Artifacts include raw ANSI, clean text, final screen, metadata, input/assertions, and exact command invocation
